title: Tech Euphoria
description: Modpack of technical mods for 1.19.2 Forge.
body:
This is a lightweight technical modpack based on Forge 1.19.2 that includes 90+ mods, but whithout Create. There are many industrial, adventure and optimisisation mods. The modpack will be updated regularly with new mods and features.

## **Optimisation**

The optimization of this modpack is based on the [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) and its additions like [Embeddium (Rubidium) Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium-extra), [Embeddium++](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddiumplus) and more.

## **Functional**

This mod pack has a lot of technical functionality, as well as support for most [Optifine functions](https://optifine.readthedocs.io/), such as improved zoom, connected glass _(**NOT** all textures)_, detailed animation and particle settings, and the use of shaders.
